description: An investor client is interested in a 10-unit apartment building and needs an analysis of its financial performance.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the property's financial documents: rent roll and trailing 12-months P&L statement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acquires the necessary financial documents from the listing agent.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the documents to calculate the Net Operating Income (NOI) and Capitalization Rate (Cap Rate).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the NOI and the asking Cap Rate.

nodes.task_description: Generate a pro-forma analysis and summary report for the investor.

expected_outcome.value: A report detailing the property's financial metrics and potential ROI is created.
